---
title: "How to Set Up and Run a Bicycle Repair Company"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2010). How to Set Up and Run a Bicycle Repair Company."
date: "2010-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_how_2010"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/5976"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This guide provides practical advice and business considerations for establishing a bicycle maintenance and repair enterprise. It covers operational aspects of small businesses supporting active travel infrastructure."
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2010

[URL](http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/5976) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This guide provides practical advice and business considerations for establishing a bicycle maintenance and repair enterprise. It covers operational aspects of small businesses supporting active travel infrastructure.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2010). How to Set Up and Run a Bicycle Repair Company.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{lovelace_how_2010,
	title = {How to {Set} {Up} and {Run} a {Bicycle} {Repair} {Company}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://campfire.theoildrum.com/node/5976},
	abstract = {This guide provides practical advice and business considerations for establishing a bicycle maintenance and repair enterprise. It covers operational aspects of small businesses supporting active travel infrastructure.},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2010},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
